title: adenia aculeata subsp. manganiana
intro: Adenia aculeata subsp. manganiana, also known as the spiny Adenia or Manganian Adenia, is a species of plant in the family Passifloraceae, native to the Philippines. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds and skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Adenia aculeata subsp. manganiana include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and soothe skin irritations, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. Adenia aculeata subsp. manganiana can be prepared into herbal preparations, such as a paste or a salve, which can be applied topically to affected areas.
